Myasthenia Gravis Tests

Myasthenia Gravis Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are myasthenia gravis (MG) tests? 
Myasthenia gravis (MG) tests are used to diagnose MG, a chronic (long-lasting) autoimmune disease that causes weakness in muscles throughout your body.
